creator: rachid@achellal.com
text:
The build libkolabxml is failing on libboost_system.so.1.82.0. I have newer version of libboost_system.so installed.

FAILED: bindings/kolabformat.cxx bindings/xCard.cxx bindings/kolabformat-xcal.cxx bindings/kolabformat-xcard.cxx bindings/iCalendar-params.cxx bindings/iCalendar-props.cxx bindings/iCalendar-valtypes.cxx /usr/ports/textproc/libkolabxml/work/.build/bindings/kolabformat.cxx /usr/ports/textproc/libkolabxml/work/.build/bindings/xCard.cxx /usr/ports/textproc/libkolabxml/work/.build/bindings/kolabformat-xcal.cxx /usr/ports/textproc/libkolabxml/work/.build/bindings/kolabformat-xcard.cxx /usr/ports/textproc/libkolabxml/work/.build/bindings/iCalendar-params.cxx /usr/ports/textproc/libkolabxml/work/.build/bindings/iCalendar-props.cxx /usr/ports/textproc/libkolabxml/work/.build/bindings/iCalendar-valtypes.cxx
